title: Petroman: Reactor Rush
description: Blast across the Petro City skyline as Petroman, a feisty little superhero with a twin-boost reactor belt. Secure unstable energy cores in sequence, build huge Spark Chains, dodge Smoglets, Drillbugs and Volt Hawks, then trigger Purifier Mode to clean the sky and turn every threat into bonus points.
shortDescription: Catch the cores, clean the sky and build huge score chains with Petroman's twin-boost reactor belt.
howToPlay: Move with the arrow keys or A and D. Press Space, W or Up to boost. Press boost again in the air for a second burst. Collect the core marked NEXT to preserve your Spark Chain. Grab the P capsule to activate Purifier Mode and safely collect enemies for bonus points.
features: Eight unique illustrated environments and tile themes
seoTitle: Petroman: Reactor Rush — Play Free Online | Mochi Mango Arcade
seoDescription: Play Petroman: Reactor Rush free online. Boost across eight vibrant stages, collect energy cores in order, build Spark Chains and clean the Petro City skyline.
